content: Clerk organization invitations: Roles must be created in Clerk Dashboard as custom roles (up to 10 per instance). Custom role key format: org:caregiver. Admin calls organization.createInvitation(emailAddress, role: 'org:caregiver'). Clerk sends email with magic link. On acceptance, new users must first sign up; existing users accept immediately. Client-side invitation is handled by the organization object in the SDK. Backend invitation via POST /v1/organizations/{org_id}/invitations with inviter_user_id, email_address, role, redirect_url parameters.
